ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock (e.g., Apple Inc.) */,
  "stock_type" TEXT /* Type of stock (e.g., common, preferred) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry to which the company belongs (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector within the industry (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* The total market value of the company's outstanding shares */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date the stock was first listed on the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the stock information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., New York Stock Exchange) */,
  "exchange_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the exchange (e.g., NYSE) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange (e.g., New York City) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone in which the exchange operates (e.g., EST, PST) */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* The hours during which the exchange is open for trading */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The email address for contacting the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the exchange information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* The adjusted closing price, which accounts for corporate actions like dividends and splits */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* The amount of dividends paid out on that date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* The ratio of the stock split, if any */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the stock price information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the access was successful */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
